text: Also, I have no experience as a salesman and it shows. Right? I think I'm supposed to say stuff like "Do you want to work at a fast-paced, results-focused company without a foosball table? We'e looking for a junior, intemediate or senior developer with solid communication skills who can defend their technical choices with solid reasoning. We value direct communication and technical reasoning over diplomacy. Blah blah blah AI!"
